brand_angle: College Park's lounge-style barbershop where a sharp fade comes with real hospitality — premium men's grooming with a clean line guaranteed.

services.title: Men's Cut with Beard

services.title: Boss Cut
services.desc: The premium full-service experience: detailed cut, beard, and hot-towel finish for the client who wants the complete chair treatment.

services.title: Shape Up / Lineup
services.desc: Quick 30-minute crisp edge-up to keep your hairline and beard razor-sharp between full cuts — adult and under-18 options.
